product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I must say, I'm quite impressed with the features it offers. I was wondering if there's any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. It's definitely a top-of-the-line product. While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I'm open to discussing a price that works for both of us. Let me know your thoughts!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. Unfortunately, the maximum budget I have for this purchase is $1,449.50. If you can work within that range, I'd be interested in moving forward.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your offer, but I'm unable to go below the wholesale price of $1,100 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. If you have any flexibility in your budget, we can try to find a price that suits both of us. Let me know if you'd like to discuss further.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for considering my budget. Unfortunately, I must adhere to my budget of $1,449.50 for this purchase. If you're unable to meet this price, I understand and will have to pass on the offer.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand your budget constraints. I'm unable to go below the wholesale price of $1,100 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. If you have any flexibility in the future or need assistance with other products, feel free to reach out. Thank you for considering the offer.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for understanding. I appreciate your offer and will keep it in mind. If there are any future opportunities or deals within my budget, I'll definitely reach out. Thank you for your time and assistance.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: You're welcome! I appreciate your consideration and I'm here to help whenever you need. Feel free to reach out anytime. Thank you for your time as well. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you! I will definitely keep that in mind. Have a wonderful day as well!
